steps.title: Interpret the multiplier
steps.content: The model is exponential with multiplier $0.85$. Each time $d$ increases by $1$, the number of species is multiplied by $0.85$. That means the model keeps $85\%$ of the previous amount.

steps.title: Use the depth units
steps.content: The variable $d$ is measured in hundreds of meters, so an increase of $1$ in $d$ means an increase of $100$ meters in depth. The model predicts a $15\%$ decrease for every $100$ meters. The answer is D.
